boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No. Source records do not satisfy STD-IRI-089-P exact-match requirements. CE-12 endorsement pending and insurance-status class verification absent.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-IRI-089-P is the binding policy requiring exact-match closure on all elements before execution. END-IRI-089 confirms CE-12 pending. WARN-IRI-089 mandates separate insurance-status class verification not provided in any current source.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Two narrow source-record defects remain OPEN before execution: (1) CE-12 carrier endorsement not confirmed, (2) insurance-status class verification required per WARN-IRI-089 not present in END-IRI-089.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: STD-IRI-089-P demands all five elements (contractor, site, coverage, date, insurance-status class) exact-match before site start. Current sources satisfy four of five. Insurance-status class verification is absent. CE-12 endorsement authority is pending. Neither gap is closable with current source set.

critical_features_preserved: action boundary exact language from STD-IRI-089-P
open blockers enumeration from prior workers
final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source records confirm SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN. END-IRI-089 shows CE-12 carrier endorsement pending. WARN-IRI-089 requires separate insurance-status class verification absent from current sources. Policy STD-IRI-089-P demands exact-match on all five elements before site start. Both blockers are definitively OPEN and unresolvable within current source set. Execution is locked until confirmed CE-12 binding endorsement and authoritative insurance-status class verification are obtained and cited.
open_blockers: CE-12 endorsement gap: END-IRI-089 confirms carrier endorsement CE-12 remains pending; no confirmed binding endorsement authority present in current sources

082-style status-class trap: WARN-IRI-089 requires separate insurance-status class verification not present in END-IRI-089 or any current source; authoritative status-class confirmation matching contractor Iris Installers, Site 4Q, umbrella coverage, 2026-06-28 is absent
resolution_path_identified: Obtain confirmed CE-12 carrier endorsement binding matching Iris Installers, Site 4Q, umbrella liability, 2026-06-28
Obtain authoritative insurance-status class verification matching contractor Iris Installers, Site 4Q, umbrella coverage, 2026-06-28 per WARN-IRI-089 requirement
